The '''T1-series utility droid''' was a series of [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droids]] manufactured by [[Duwani Mechanical Products/Legends|Duwani Mechanical Products]] prior to the introduction of the [[T3-series utility droid]].

The original T1 series of droids—the [[LB-series bulk-loading droid|T1-series bulk-loading droid]]—were manufactured by [[Kellenech Technologies]] before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], but the company collapsed in the following years. Its assets were liquidated and the T1-series trademark was purchased by Duwani Mechanical Products.

The new owners of the trademark manufactured their unrelated T1-series of [[Cleaning droid/Legends|utility droids]] using the designation, and as a result, Kellenech's old T1-series became commonly known as the "LB"-series so as to differentiate it from the newer production model.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
